title: Weather_block
description: Weather block that allows you to change the weather as you wish without cheating
body:
This mod allows you to change the weather without having to use commands or cheats, all of which are balanced, and the crafts are also balanced.

crafting sunny weather block

![crafting sunny weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f93a06771ba1cd03076b634eefd4dde59a6eb4.png)

crafting rainy weather block

![crafting rainy weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/613782265d2f577fb31a197b372c3c1a5c347350.png)

crafting stormy weather block

![crafting stormy weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93a3c75bc0d6059a7bb317cddf014777c8927e2f.png)

A bug or an improvement? Contact me at Simunix@lexpage.net

# fr:

Ce mod vous permet de modifier la météo sans avoir à utiliser de commandes ou de codes de triche, qui sont tous équilibrés, tout comme les objets artisanaux.

craft du block de soleil

![crafting sunny weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f93a06771ba1cd03076b634eefd4dde59a6eb4.png)

craft du block de pluie

![crafting rainy weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/613782265d2f577fb31a197b372c3c1a5c347350.png)

craft du block de tonner

![crafting stormy weather block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93a3c75bc0d6059a7bb317cddf014777c8927e2f.png)

Un bug ou une amélioration ? Contactez-moi à l'adresse Simunix@lexpage.net
